programs.name: ICCR Travel Grant for Artists
programs.what: Round-trip economy airfare for Indian citizens performing or presenting at cultural events abroad
programs.eligibility: Indian citizens; visual or performing artists or scholars; must have invitation from foreign host organization
covers: Round-trip economy airfare via shortest route
howToApply: Secure formal invitation letter from US host
Apply online at iccr.gov.in travel grant portal
Get endorsement from local Indian Mission (CGI Seattle or SF)
Wait for ICCR review and approval
programs.contact: Via CGI Seattle or CGI SF cultural wing
programs.notes: Most directly applicable funding source for Indian artists. Consulate endorsement is critical.

programs.name: ICCR Empanelled Artists / Outgoing Cultural Delegations
programs.what: ICCR maintains a curated pool of empanelled Indian artists; sponsors official cultural delegations abroad drawn from this pool
programs.eligibility: Indian artists 18+; must apply to be empanelled; US hosts can request specific empanelled artists
howToApply: Artists apply to ICCR for empanelment year-round
US hosts request delegations via the Consulate
programs.contact: Via CGI Seattle or CGI SF
programs.notes: Worth requesting an empanelled delegation as part of the festival lineup

programs.name: ICCR Cultural Chairs at Universities
programs.what: ICCR-funded Chairs of Indian Studies at select universities globally
programs.eligibility: Universities apply; not directly applicable to festival hosts but useful for partnership
howToApply: Identify US universities with existing ICCR Chairs
programs.notes: Year 2 expansion opportunity

programs.name: ICCR Art Residency Programme
programs.what: International artists can apply for short-term residencies in India
programs.notes: Reverse-direction program; useful for Year 2 sister programming

programs.name: Lata Mangeshkar Dance & Music Scholarship Scheme
programs.what: ~100 scholarships globally for foreign students to study Indian classical dance, music, theatre, performing arts, sculpture, languages, cuisine in India
programs.timeline: Applications open Feb-April annually; for AY 2026-27, open 27 Feb to 15 April 2026
programs.notes: Useful for US-based students we want to develop as future festival artists

programs.name: Know India Programme (KIP)
programs.what: Engagement program for people of Indian origin between 18-30
programs.notes: Secondary; could feed festival volunteer pipeline

programs.name: Government of India Ministry of Culture Schemes
programs.operator: Ministry of Culture, Government of India
programs.what: Multiple schemes including Guru-Shishya Parampara honorariums, repertory grants, financial assistance for cultural events abroad
programs.notes: India-side preparation funding for participating artists

programs.name: India Culture Week Template (CGI Seattle)
programs.what: Multi-day immersive cultural programming with university partner; replicable framework
programs.eligibility: US universities and cultural institutions in CGI Seattle jurisdiction
howToApply: Propose to be next India Culture Week partner
programs.notes: PRIMARY TEMPLATE for our festival

programs.name: India Corner Library Gift Program
programs.what: 100-book India Collection gifted to partner US universities
programs.eligibility: US universities partnering with CGI Seattle
programs.notes: Bundle with festival as academic extension

programs.name: Seattle Center Festal Indian Programming
programs.operator: CGI Seattle + Northwest Share + Seattle Center
programs.what: Annual Diwali: Lights of India and other Indian programming at Seattle Center
programs.notes: Possible co-presentation or piggyback opportunity

programs.name: CGI SF Cultural Programming Partnerships
programs.what: Co-presentation of major Indian classical concerts at premier Bay Area venues
programs.eligibility: Established cultural institutions and serious cultural projects
howToApply: Reference Vivekananda tribute concert as model
programs.notes: Recent precedent: July 2025 concert at Center for the Performing Arts, San Jose

programs.name: International Day of Yoga (CGI SF)
programs.what: Annual yoga celebration at Golden Gate Bridge
programs.notes: Soft-launch opportunity if festival timing aligns

programs.name: US Embassy New Delhi Public Diplomacy Small Grants
programs.operator: US Embassy New Delhi - Public Affairs Section
programs.what: Small grants strengthening US-India cultural ties; arts programming and performances eligible
programs.eligibility: Programs must include American cultural element or connection with American experts/institutions
howToApply: Check grants.gov for current open RFP
Submit proposal with US-India co-programming element
programs.timeline: 3-6 month review cycle (challenging on 6-month festival timeline)
programs.notes: Risky on our timeline; submit as stretch upside

programs.name: U.S. Ambassador's Fund for Cultural Preservation
programs.what: Preservation of historic buildings, monuments, museum collections, manuscripts, traditional cultural expressions in India and Bhutan
programs.notes: Not directly applicable; useful if we add cultural-preservation element

programs.name: Fulbright-Nehru Fellowships
programs.what: Scholarly exchange between US and India
programs.notes: Year 2 — pair scholar/artist program with festival

programs.name: Arts Envoy Program
programs.operator: US State Department - Bureau of Educational and Cultural Affairs
programs.what: Sends US artists abroad to foster cross-cultural understanding
programs.notes: Year 2 reverse-direction opportunity

programs.name: NEA Grants for Arts Projects
programs.what: Project funding in arts categories including Music, Dance, Theater
programs.eligibility: Must be 501(c)(3); fiscal sponsorship qualifies for most
programs.notes: Cycle is too long for Year 1

programs.name: California Arts Council Grants
programs.what: State arts project and program grants
programs.notes: Direct fit for SF Bay Area anchor; check open RFPs

programs.name: 4Culture (King County, WA)
programs.what: Local arts project grants for King County
programs.notes: Has funded Seattle Center Festal Indian programming

programs.name: Washington State Arts Commission (ArtsWA)
programs.what: State organizational and project grants

programs.name: ACTA Living Cultures Grant
programs.what: Grants supporting traditional arts programming in California
programs.notes: The Music Circle (LA, Ravi Shankar's org) has received multiple Living Cultures grants — direct precedent for Indian classical programming
